item.title: Stepfather’s Lies Unravel as Missing Girl Is Found Dead
item.description: A stepfather’s story didn’t add up. How did investigators uncover the lies and find the missing girl’s body?

item.title: Jealous Boyfriend Murdered Her and Her Sister | María José & Sofía

item.title: Husband Witnessed His Wife Being Shot in Their Car

item.title: His Mom Helped Him Cover Up His Girlfriend’s Disappearance
item.description: When his girlfriend vanished, investigators uncovered a shocking twist—his own mother helped hide the truth. How did the cover‑up unravel?

item.title: Daniela Tabares Case Part Two | Jealous Gym Acquaintance
item.description: A 51‑year‑old gym acquaintance’s jealousy spiraled into tragedy. What new revelations unfold in Part Two of the Daniela Tabares case?
